chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 50 of 2013 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.406/2013 18.09.2025 None present This reference application is pending since 2013 without any progress. Diary demonstrates persistent absences of the applicant’s counsel, same is the case today. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
